channel.title: Stable-Diffusion on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stable-Diffusion on Arrans github.io

item.title: Comfy-Org/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: invoke-ai/InvokeAI
item.description: Invoke is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

item.title: huggingface/diffusers
item.description: 🤗 Diffusers: State-of-the-art diffusion models for image, video, and audio generation in PyTorch.

item.title: vladmandic/sdnext
item.description: SD.Next: All-in-one WebUI for AI generative image and video creation, captioning and processing

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: AbdBarho/stable-diffusion-webui-docker
item.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

item.title: kabachuha/sd-webui-text2video
item.description: Auto1111 extension implementing text2video diffusion models (like ModelScope or VideoCrafter) using only Auto1111 webui dependencies
